title: 关于印发《数据中心绿色低碳发展专项行动计划》的通知 (Notice on Issuing the Data Center Green and Low-Carbon Development Special Action Plan), 发改环资〔2024〕970号
authors_or_org: National Development and Reform Commission; Ministry of Industry and Information Technology; National Energy Administration; National Data Administration (China)
claim_supported: Sets PUE<=1.25/1.2 caps for new large DCs/hub nodes by end-2025 and a 2030 'international advanced level' efficiency horizon.
locator: Notice 发改环资〔2024〕970号, issued 2024-07-03, published 2024-07-23; body text of linked action plan.
notes: Regulatory-trigger source for CN datacenter thermal/power demand across B-01, B-22, C-01. Distinct from atlas L14-036 (2026 AI-energy action plan) and L14-035 (GB 40879 revision).

india_origin_audit.notes: Official PRC central-government domain (ndrc.gov.cn); no India affiliation possible.

title: 数据中心能效限定值及能效等级 (GB 40879 revision draft status) — National Standard Information Public Service Platform
authors_or_org: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) / Standardization Administration of China
claim_supported: Confirms GB 40879 revision (public comment 2025-03-17 to 04-16) expands scope to all cooling methods incl. liquid cooling and tightens PUE limits.
locator: SAMR gbDetailed record id 2E4DD4D8E2E84A4BE06397BE0A0AE354, revision project page, fetched 2026-07-13.
notes: Deepens/refreshes atlas L14-035; not yet finalized/published as of access date.

title: 2026年南网电算工程公司数据中心液冷技术及能效调优公开招标项目 (2026 Southern Power Grid Computing Technology Digital Engineering (Guangdong) Data Center Liquid Cooling Technology and Energy Efficiency Optimization Public Tender)
authors_or_org: Southern Power Grid Computing Technology Digital Engineering (Guangdong) Co., Ltd. / Southern Power Grid Supply Chain (Guangdong) Co., Ltd.
claim_supported: Named CN state-grid-affiliated buyer publicly tendered data-center liquid-cooling and energy-efficiency-optimization equipment/engineering, announced 2026-04-13.
locator: Tender notice / bid-candidate announcement, project code CG2100022002264708, hangnian.com bid-tracking mirror.
notes: Scope is general liquid-cooling/efficiency retrofit, not two-phase/negative-pressure specific; winning bidder not disclosed in publicly viewable content (membership-gated).

india_origin_audit.notes: Buyer is a China Southern Power Grid subsidiary; hangnian.com is a CN bid-tracking aggregator mirroring the official notice.

title: 2.07亿！国产化万卡智算大单，阿里拿下 (RMB 207M: Alibaba wins the domestic 10,000-card intelligent computing pool order) — China Telecom Guangdong Phase 2 tender
authors_or_org: China Telecom Group Co., Ltd. Guangdong Branch (buyer); reported by Tencent News / ZAKER
claim_supported: China Telecom Guangdong's 2026 domestic 10,000-card AI compute-pool Phase 2 tender (RMB216M ceiling) awarded to Alibaba Cloud (~RMB207M bid), announced 2026-03-09.
locator: Tencent News article body, procurement scope/budget-ceiling and winning-bidder paragraphs, dated 2026-03-09/10.
notes: Cross-confirmed against ZAKER/MyZaker mirror with matching figures/dates. Treated as accepted trade-press evidence of AI-compute buildout scale in China rather than cooling-technology-specific demand for B-01's exact mechanism.

india_origin_audit.notes: Buyer and reporting outlets both CN-domiciled.

title: 数据中心，液冷正成为必选项 (Data centers: liquid cooling is becoming mandatory) — Sugon Digital C8000 V3.0 coverage
authors_or_org: 36Kr, reporting on Sugon Digital (曙光数创, Shenzhen Stock Exchange BSE 872808.BJ)
claim_supported: Sugon Digital ships a >900kW/cabinet, >200W/cm2 megawatt-class phase-change immersion two-phase liquid-cooling product, C8000 V3.0.
locator: 36kr article body, product-spec paragraph on Sugon Digital C8000 V3.0.
notes: Vendor-claimed specs, not independently re-verified against a datasheet or filing; used only as competitor-existence evidence.

india_origin_audit.notes: 36Kr is a CN outlet; subject company is CN-listed (872808.BJ).

title: 剑指独立量产静电吸盘 江丰电子与KSTE达成合作 (Aiming for independent mass production of electrostatic chucks: Jiangfeng Electronics partners with KSTE)
authors_or_org: Sina Finance, reporting on Ningbo Jiangfeng Electronics Material Co., Ltd. (300666) disclosure
claim_supported: Jiangfeng Electronics signed a full-stack ESC production-technology transfer framework agreement with Korea's KSTE INC. on 2025-01-17, targeting independent mainland-China mass production.
locator: Sina Finance article reporting the 2025-01-20 listed-company disclosure; article body, agreement-terms paragraph.
notes: Does NOT satisfy the seed's binding gate (named ESC-localization tender or ceramics-maker co-development LOI for the electronics module) -- this is a ceramic-ESC whole-stack tech transfer from an existing Korean producer, not a tender/LOI for the seed's clamp-electronics product.

india_origin_audit.notes: CN-listed company and Korean technology partner; no India affiliation.

title: 中瓷电子：持续开发陶瓷材料，致力于静电卡盘等精密陶瓷部件国产化 (China Ceramics Electronics: continued ceramic-material development, committed to localizing precision ceramic components incl. ESC)
authors_or_org: China Powder Network (中国粉体网), reporting on China Ceramics Electronics (中瓷电子) 2022 investor briefing
claim_supported: China Ceramics Electronics states strategic intent to localize ESC/heating-disc ceramic components; no investment figure or capacity target disclosed.
notes: Strategic-intent statement only, not a tender or LOI; used to show the gate remains unmet.

title: Trek 646 Series — Software-Driven Electrostatic Chuck Supply
claim_supported: Advanced Energy already sells a standalone merchant HV clamp-power-supply module (0 to +/-3kV, Coulombic and Johnsen-Rahbek support) through normal distribution channels.
locator: Product page body, specifications and distribution-model sections.
notes: Direct competitor evidence: the seed's core product category already has a shipping global merchant incumbent (not China-qualified).

title: 中华人民共和国国民经济和社会发展第十五个五年规划纲要 (PRC 15th Five-Year Plan for National Economic and Social Development, Outline)
authors_or_org: State Council of the People's Republic of China; authorized release via Two Sessions
claim_supported: Chapter 8 names integrated circuits among sectors requiring 'decisive breakthroughs' in core technology via 'extraordinary measures' by 2030.
locator: Xinhua official-text distribution, Chapter 8 (关键核心技术攻关), quoted clause on integrated circuits.
notes: Primary/official 2030-horizon government document; used as shared umbrella 2030-timing trigger across four G03 ideas. No ESC-, HVDC-, or 800V-specific quantified target found in fetched excerpt.

institutions.name: State Council of the People's Republic of China

india_origin_audit.notes: Xinhua (news.cn) is the official PRC state news agency distributing the authorized text.

title: Fortescue signs decarb-focused agreements as it rejigs battery electric truck build plans
claim_supported: XCMG to supply up to half of Fortescue's 300-400 planned 240t BEV haul trucks, phased deliveries 2028-2030; no charging-standard/dual-standard-hardware procurement mentioned.
locator: Article body, deal-terms and delivery-phasing paragraphs, dated 2025-09-26.
notes: Confirms the delivery timeline the seed cites but does not evidence dual-standard interface-hardware demand.

india_origin_audit.notes: UK-based trade publication; subject companies China (XCMG) and Australia (Fortescue).

title: Fortescue fits out first 240 tonne electric haul truck, and rolls out first 6 MW fast charger
claim_supported: Fortescue commissioned its own in-house-developed 6MW fast charger for its 240t BEV trucks (fixed, not pantograph); no IEC TS 63379/dual-standard hardware procurement mentioned.
locator: Article body, charger-development and truck-spec paragraphs, dated 2026-05-25.
notes: Directly undermines the seed's dual-standard-converter demand thesis for this named channel: the buyer built proprietary charging hardware rather than sourcing a merchant bridge.

india_origin_audit.notes: Australia-based trade outlet and subject company.

title: Rio Tinto and China's State Power Investment Corporation launch battery swap truck trial fleet at Oyu Tolgoi mine
claim_supported: Rio Tinto/SPIC Qiyuan launched a battery-swap trial (8 Tonly 91t trucks, 13x800kWh batteries) at Oyu Tolgoi, explicitly a trial through end-2026, no export or dual-standard-hardware plan mentioned.
locator: Official press release body, fleet-specification and trial-status paragraphs, dated 2025-10-27.
notes: Primary buyer-side company source; does not evidence a dual-standard converter need or an export follow-on.

india_origin_audit.notes: Official corporate press release from Rio Tinto (Australia/UK dual-listed).

title: Official publication of IEC TS 63379: A game-changer for Megawatt Charging System (MCS) standardization
claim_supported: IEC TS 63379 (MCS connectors/inlets/cable assemblies for megawatt DC charging) formally published 2026-02-09.
locator: CharIN official news release, publication-date and scope paragraphs.
notes: Confirms the MCS side of the seed's 'dual standard' premise is now formally locked; no commercial-rollout date stated in this release.

india_origin_audit.notes: CharIN is a Germany-headquartered global EV-charging interoperability consortium.

title: SuperX与中恒电气的合资公司发布两款800VDC供电方案 解决高功率算力集群供电瓶颈 (SuperX and Zhongheng Electric's joint venture releases two 800VDC power solutions to solve high-power AI compute cluster power bottlenecks)
authors_or_org: STCN (Securities Times, stcn.com), reporting on SuperX Digital Power Pte. Ltd. / Zhongheng Electric joint venture
claim_supported: SuperX/Zhongheng Electric JV launched Panama-800VDC (new-build, ~98.5% peak efficiency) and Aurora-800VDC (hours-per-cabinet retrofit) products on 2025-11-02.
locator: Article body, product-launch and technical-spec paragraphs, dated 2025-11-02.
notes: SuperX Digital Power's 'Pte. Ltd.' designation reflects a holding-company incorporation jurisdiction for this CN-focused JV; the product, customers, and market are China-based. Not used as a Singapore market/buyer claim -- cited solely as CN competitor/product evidence, consistent with the binding geography exclusion of Singapore as a market.

india_origin_audit.notes: CN-domiciled reporting outlet and CN JV partner (Zhongheng Electric); no India affiliation.

title: Innoscience supports 800 VDC power architecture with an all-GaN power solution, enabling the AI Factories of the future

locator: Company press release body, product-scope and ecosystem-role paragraphs, dated 2025-10-13.
notes: Company's own primary announcement; corroborates atlas L02-050 (Sina Finance reporting Innoscience as the only Chinese company selected).

india_origin_audit.notes: CN-headquartered GaN IDM; official company domain.

title: 商务部 海关总署公告2023年第23号 关于对镓、锗相关物项实施出口管制的公告 (MOFCOM/GACC Announcement No. 23 of 2023 on Export Controls for Gallium- and Germanium-Related Items)

notes: Relevant to C-01's China-variant GaN supply chain (Innoscience-class devices) and dual-entity (US+CN) structuring.

institutions.name: Ministry of Commerce of the People's Republic of China

title: 聚力高压直流供电技术突破，协同构建AI算力基础设施标准｜2026 OAII Summit 800V 供配电主题论坛圆满落幕 (2026 OAII Summit 800V Power Supply Forum wrap-up)
authors_or_org: GCC-Open AI Infra community; Third Generation Semiconductor Industry Technology Innovation Strategic Alliance (cooperating org); co-chaired by Baidu Intelligent Cloud and ByteDance
claim_supported: Baidu/ByteDance-co-chaired forum (2026-04-23), with Huawei/Vertiv/Schneider/Inspur, states 800V DC protection logic differs completely from 240V HVDC and that China lacks unified fault-output/grounding/arc/IMD standards and an 800V safety-certification standard.
locator: Event report body, forum-leadership, participants, and key-challenges sections, dated 2026-04-23.
notes: Buyer-co-chaired (Baidu, ByteDance are hyperscaler buyers) industry-forum report; closest available primary-adjacent CN demand evidence for the exact protection/certification gap C-01 targets.

india_origin_audit.notes: CN industry community and CN co-chairing hyperscalers; no India affiliation.

title: Inside the 800VDC Revolution – Part 1
claim_supported: Names the funded SST/SSCB competitive set for 800VDC datacenters: DG Matrix (in NVIDIA MGX reference design), Amperesand, Heron Power, Novos Power, Eaton (acquired Resilient Power Systems Aug 2025), ABB SACE Infinitus, LS Electric; >$320M into SST startups in the 12 months to March 2026.
notes: Respected technical trade press (SemiAnalysis); primary competitor-landscape evidence for the US leg, incl. the confirmed platform-owner-absorption risk (DG Matrix inside NVIDIA's own reference architecture).

title: GTC 2025: NVIDIA Unveils More on Rubin GPUs, Announces Feynman for 2028 in Roadmap Update
claim_supported: NVIDIA's annual-cadence roadmap: Rubin (2026), Rubin Ultra/Kyber NVL576 (H2 2027), Feynman (2028), reaffirmed at GTC 2025 and GTC 2026.
notes: Primary/official-adjacent (company roadmap reaffirmed at company's own conference, reported by TW-based industry analyst firm); gives the explicit 2028 generation used as a 2028-2035 timing trigger for C-01.
